content:
What Cloudflare Is Changing?
Cloudflare is giving website owners more control over how AI bots and crawlers access their content.
Instead of treating all bots as one group, Cloudflare is separating them into three categories:
Search Bots that crawl content for search indexing and discovery.
Agent Bots that act on behalf of a user in real time, such as an AI assistant opening a page to answer a question.
Training Bots that collect content to train or improve AI models.
This distinction matters.
A website owner may be comfortable allowing search crawlers because they bring traffic. But that same owner may not want their content used to train an AI model without permission, compensation, or attribution.
Cloudflare is making that choice easier.

  submitted by   /u/HouseOfCoder
